description: Calendly is scheduling software that automates meeting booking from real-time availability, cutting back-and-forth email and reducing no-shows for teams.
overview: Calendly automates meeting scheduling by sharing real-time availability, connecting calendars, customizing event types, and integrating with conferencing and CRM tools.
what_is: Calendly is a scheduling tool that removes the back-and-forth of booking meetings. It connects to calendars like Google and Microsoft, shows real-time availability through a shareable link, and sends reminders to reduce no-shows.
It is widely used for sales calls, client check-ins, and team meetings. Sharing a booking link saves hours of coordination, and value shows up immediately after setup.

In a go-to-market stack, Calendly integrates with CRM, email, video conferencing, and productivity tools to streamline handoffs. It focuses on scheduling rather than project management or broader communication.
